assertion_results.text: Step 2.1.1 loads the canonical template at docs/templates/security-matrix.template.md and extracts required section headings and Ecosystem Mappings column names

assertion_results.evidence: For both streams, the 'Required Sections Present' table explicitly checks all four sections (Supportability Matrix, Source Pinning Method, Ecosystem Mappings, Forward Pointer) and marks each as 'Yes' / 'PASS'.

assertion_results.text: Step 2.1.1 validates that both tables are parsable (header row, separator row, data rows)

assertion_results.text: The validation result is Pass — no warnings, no auto-repairs, no user prompt — triage proceeds silently to aggregation
assertion_results.evidence: Both streams show 'Auto-Repairs Applied: None required' and 'Warnings: None' and 'Overall Result: PASS / No issues found. Proceed without user interruption.' The final summary states: 'Overall validation result: PASS -- all matrix files conform to the canonical template... No auto-repairs were needed and no warnings were raised.
